accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context regarding the IIJA program and DOE administration.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Secretary refers to the Energy Secretary administering the IIJA program.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies reauthorization and revision of the Rural and Municipal Utility Advanced Cybersecurity Program.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the bill amends the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act and reauthorizes the program.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures eligibility limits, priority criteria, and the FOIA-style disclosure exemption.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the FY2026-2030 appropriations period.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers establishment, objectives, eligibility, award process, priorities, information protection, and funding.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriately detailed.

correct_entities.why: Correctly references the IIJA, the program name, and the Secretary.

correct_figures.why: The $250 million, FY2026-2030, 4,000,000 MWh, and six-entity figures are all accurate.
